headline: Apple-Nvidia Friends Again? Nvidia Says Its Chips In Google Cloud Are Powering Apple Intelligence
summary: Apple shifted to AMD’s graphics chips around 2015 after encountering reliability issues with some Nvidia GPUs, alongside broader disagreements over product design, technology roadmaps, and licensing.

headline: Apple EU AI Delay Puts Spotlight On Valuation And Growth Expectations
summary: Apple (NasdaqGS:AAPL) is delaying the launch of its new Siri AI and Apple Intelligence features in the European Union. The initial rollout will focus on the U.S. and select other markets while Apple works to address EU regulatory requirements, including the Digital Markets Act. The decision limits access to these next-generation AI tools for hundreds of millions of European users at launch. For readers following Apple, this development comes right after the company highlighted a rebuilt...

headline: A glossary to help understand what happens in an initial public offering
summary: Anyone following SpaceX's plans to sell shares to the public is likely to hear terms thrown around that describe steps and components of an initial public offering.  It is the first time a company's value will be determined by a public market.  For example, Apple is traded as “AAPL” on the Nasdaq and Macy's is traded as “M” on the New York Stock Exchange.

content.title: A glossary to help understand what happens in an initial public offering
